title: clerodendrum cephalanthum subsp. impensum
intro: Clerodendrum cephalanthum subsp. impensum is a plant species commonly known as the 'Himalayan Glory Bower', which is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Clerodendrum cephalanthum subsp. impensum can be used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
